title: Blonks
description: This mod adds tank-like blocks called Blonks
body:
## Blonks
![Blonks firing out shells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62cdbc27b9660272e6d7e5c9758209dbd53ceba5_0.webp)
- Tank like blocks that shoot **exploding shells**

- Can be dyed into **16 different colors**

- Can be **loaded** by either right-clicking with a shell or using the GUI

- Very durable and has a **high blast resistance**
  
- If a destructive shell explodes nearby, it turns into a **Broken Blonk**
  
- If a destructive shell directly hits a Blonk, it breaks with a **HUGE** explosion _(trust me, it is HUGE)_

## Broken Blonks
![Broken Blonk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82b4dac61fcae729e87ad8ad2e18be5830e007ee.png)
- When a shell explodes near a Blonk, it turns into a **weaker** and **non-usable** variant called the Broken Blonk
  
- Can be repaired back into a Blonk by right-clicking with a **Scrap**

- Can be **smelted** to obtain a Scrap

## Shells![Shell items inside glowing item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22c749b891fc60ed18150b67b037034d182c80a3_0.webp)
### 1. Shell
![Classic Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f619ff72223ed1bae900ad903d1a9df224533c0d_0.webp)
The good ol' classic kaboom

### 2. Dragon Shell (Non-Destructive)
![Dragon Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/121415876c20928352fcc801ae358c9d4d2fb92b.jpeg)
Bad breath is already terrible, Imagine Dragons... (no pun intended)

### 3. HE Shell
![HE Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc58ca870d6b446847f27ea6d2f6a7eba419707d.jpeg)
A more _high energy_ boom than your regular

### 4. HEAT Shell
![HEAT Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee79584a74f78d3f2e892e6bac91c3d53146c6c4.jpeg)
I can feel the HEAT all the way from here

### 7. Nuclear Shell
![Nuclear Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c9bb37824c502753cacb45d6eaf45fe3a7ac06.jpeg)
Its a nuke... (I mean, what else did you expect?)

### 6. Smoke Shell (Non-Destructive)
![Smoke Shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db794b698ef8146299dbe51b85ba3610477ee5cd.jpeg)
A little puff ain't so bad, innit?

## Scrap 
- This item can only be obtained by **trading with an armorer villager** on its **max level**
  
- Can be used to **fix Broken Blonks** or **smelted into a Metal Alloy** which is used to **craft Blonks**

## Ammo Items
- **Explosive mix**: Special powder crafted with 2 gunpowder and 2 bone meals, granting you 4 pieces

- **Casing**: A basic item crafted with 2 golden ingots, granting you 4 pieces.
  
- **Ammo rack**: A compat block crafted with 9 shells. Can be placed and instantly mined with your hand
